Scoring Total: Add up all of your ratings above to calculate your total score.
My total score is ________/100.
Here’s the good news: Even if you received a 0/100 you can still achieve massive wealth and success—so long as you are
open to the idea of educating and growing yourself and modeling proven strategies. No matter what your total score is, you
can turn it around and put yourself on the road to wealth and success.
